description_long: This is a compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, modern design. The body is constructed primarily from metal, featuring a prominent Picatinny rail along the top for mounting accessories. The grip is textured for secure handling, and the magazine extends downward in front of the trigger guard, suggesting a box-fed configuration. The rear of the shotgun has a short, solid stock with a slightly curved buttplate, and the front end is fitted with a short barrel and a muzzle device. The overall form is streamlined and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, making it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a Picatinny rail, box magazine, and short stock, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the Picatinny rail, grip, box magazine, and short stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the width of the Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine, grip, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the buttplate of the stock and the alignment of the rail and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with a robust, reinforced appearance
